heading: Plan for elk restoration and conservation; coordination of Secretary of the Interior with Federal, State and other officers; integration with State plans
label: 673g Plan for elk restoration and conservation; coordination of Secretary of the Interior with Federal, State and other officers; integration with State plans
text: The Secretary of the Interior, in coordination with all Federal, State, and other officers having jurisdiction over lands on which Tule elk herds are located or lands which would provide suitable Tule elk habitat, shall develop a plan for Tule elk restoration and conservation, including habitat management, which shall be integrated with the comparable plans of State and local authorities in California.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 3 of Pub. L. 94–389section 673f of this titlePub. L. 105–362
Amendments1982— struck out requirement that the Secretary’s annual report to Congress describe the development and implementation of the plan.Pub. L. 97–375
amendments: Amendments1982— struck out requirement that the Secretary’s annual report to Congress describe the development and implementation of the plan.Pub. L. 97–375
